title: Yönetici Özeti
description: Üst yönetim tek bakışta: toplam maliyet, turnover, kişi başı maliyet, cinsiyet farkı ve risk alarmları.

trend.where: PUANTAJ_ID IN (SELECT PUANTAJ_ID FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] WHERE SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 2)

aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0

aggregate.join: CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN prev.SALARY > 0 THEN (cur.SALARY - prev.SALARY) / prev.SALARY ELSE NULL END) AS avg_increase FROM (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, SALARY FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) cur INNER JOIN (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, SALARY FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1 AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) prev ON cur.EMPLOYEE_ID = prev.EMPLOYEE_ID) yoy_sub

CROSS JOIN (SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND FINISH_DATE >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID), 0) AS turnover_rate FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] WHERE FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL OR FINISH_DATE IS NULL) turn_sub

aggregate.where: [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE IS NOT NULL

aggregate.select: 1.0 - (AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN SALARY END) / NULLIF(AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 1 THEN SALARY END), 0))
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES] e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID

CROSS JOIN (SELECT (2.0 * SUM(s.rn * s.SALARY) / (MAX(s.cnt) * SUM(s.SALARY))) - ((MAX(s.cnt) + 1.0) / MAX(s.cnt)) AS gini_val FROM (SELECT SALARY, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SALARY) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) s) gini_sub

aggregate.select: CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2) AS label, SUM(SALARY + SSK_ISVEREN_HISSESI + ISSIZLIK_ISVEREN_HISSESI) AS value, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value2
aggregate.where: (ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) OR (ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE())-1 AND ep.SAL_MON >= MONTH(GETDATE()))) AND ep.SAL_MON <= CASE WHEN ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN MONTH(GETDATE())-1 ELSE 12 END
aggregate.groupBy: CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2)

aggregate.join: CROSS JOIN (SELECT 'Brüt Maaş' AS label, SUM(SALARY) AS value, 1 AS sort_order FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'SGK İşveren', SUM(SSK_ISVEREN_HISSESI), 2 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Gelir Vergisi', SUM(GELIR_VERGISI), 3 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'İşsizlik', SUM(ISSIZLIK_ISVEREN_HISSESI + ISSIZLIK_ISCI_HISSESI), 4 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Fazla Mesai', SUM(EXT_SALARY), 5 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1) cost_item

charts.title: Departman: Kişi Sayısı ve Ort. Maaş

aggregate.select: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(ROW_DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, AVG(SALARY) AS value, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0

aggregate.select: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(ep.COMP_NICK_NAME),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, SUM(SALARY + SSK_ISVEREN_HISSESI + ISSIZLIK_ISVEREN_HISSESI) AS value

FORMAT([workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE, 'yyyy-MM') AS label, COUNT(CASE WHEN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NULL OR [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE > [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].START_DATE THEN 1 END) AS value, COUNT(CASE WHEN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT].FINISH_DATE >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) THEN 1 END) AS value2

charts.title: Yaka Tipi: Kişi Sayısı ve Ort. Maaş

aggregate.select: CASE epos.COLLAR_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'Mavi Yaka' WHEN 2 THEN 'Beyaz Yaka' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, AVG(SALARY) AS value, COUNT(*) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] epos ON epos.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND epos.POSITION_STATUS = 1

collarType.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] epos ON epos.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND epos.POSITION_STATUS = 1
